mapper.select: SELECT ps.current_queue_id, ps.current_song_id, ps.current_position, ps.current_progress, ps.playmode, q.queue_id, q.queue_name, q.creator_id, q.song_count, q.is_current, q.created_date, q.updated_date, qi.queue_item_id, qi.queue_item_position, qi.queue_id as qi_queue_id, qi.added_date, s.song_id, s.song_title, s.song_cover_url, s.song_url, s.artist, s.album FROM play_state ps LEFT JOIN queues q ON ps.user_id = q.creator_id AND ps.current_queue_id = q.queue_id LEFT JOIN queue_items qi ON q.queue_id = qi.queue_id JOIN songs s ON qi.song_id = s.song_id WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT q.queue_id, q.queue_name, q.creator_id, q.song_count, q.is_current, q.created_date, q.updated_date, qi.queue_item_id, qi.queue_item_position, qi.queue_id as qi_queue_id, qi.added_date, s.song_id, s.song_title, s.song_cover_url, s.song_url, s.artist, s.album FROM queues q LEFT JOIN queue_items qi ON q.queue_id = qi.queue_id LEFT JOIN songs s ON qi.song_id = s.song_id WHERE q.creator_id = #{userId}

SELECT q.queue_id, q.queue_name, q.creator_id, q.song_count, q.is_current, q.created_date, q.updated_date, qi.queue_item_id, qi.queue_item_position, qi.queue_id as qi_queue_id, qi.added_date, s.song_id, s.song_title, s.song_cover_url, s.song_url, s.artist, s.album FROM queues q LEFT JOIN queue_items qi ON q.queue_id = qi.queue_id LEFT JOIN songs s ON qi.song_id = s.song_id WHERE q.queue_id = #{queueId} ORDER BY qi.queue_item_position ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE queue_items SET queue_item_position = queue_item_position + 1 WHERE queue_id = #{queueId} AND queue_item_position >= #{pos}
UPDATE queues SET song_count = song_count + 1 WHERE queue_id = #{queueId}
UPDATE queue_items SET queue_item_position = queue_item_position - 1 WHERE queue_id = #{queueId} AND queue_item_position > #{pos}
UPDATE queues SET song_count = GREATEST(song_count - 1, 0) WHERE queue_id = #{queueId}
UPDATE queue_items SET queue_item_position = CASE song_id WHEN #{id} THEN #{index} + 1 END WHERE queue_id = #{queueId} AND song_id IN #{id}

UPDATE play_state ps JOIN queue_items qi ON ps.current_song_id = qi.song_id AND ps.current_queue_id = qi.queue_id SET ps.current_position = qi.queue_item_position WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId} AND ps.current_queue_id = #{queueId}
